root_cause: Volume device conflict prevents volume attachment or mount
evidence: FailedAttachVolume or FailedMount event contains explicit conflict semantics
Conflict points to multi-attach, busy-device, or volumeMode mismatch behavior
Dominant error message: MapVolume.MapPodDevice failed for volume "data" : volume mode "Filesystem" does not match pod request for raw block device

causes.message: Volume cannot be attached due to conflicting usage or device semantics
Kubelet or CSI driver fails to attach or mount the volume
Pod cannot access required volume and cannot start

pod:payments-db-0: Pod blocked due to volume device conflict during attach or mount

likely_causes: Volume already attached to another node (multi-attach violation)
Same volume used with conflicting volumeMode (Block vs Filesystem)
Device path already in use on node
CSI driver enforcing exclusive access constraints
suggested_checks: Verify volumeMode consistency across Pods and PVCs
Inspect CSI driver logs for attachment errors
